Interface IAMFSerializer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to high-level AMF serialization methods.

[Guid("8F6F56FC-A942-44F5-AF7D-5312FDF0C0C6")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAMFSerializer : IExternalSerializer

Properties

Writer

Obtains AMF Writer.

IAMFWriter Writer { get; }

Property Value

IAMFWriter

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

InitSerializer(IAMFWriter, IPropertySet) 

void InitSerializer(IAMFWriter pWriter, IPropertySet pProps)

Parameters

pWriter IAMFWriter
pProps IPropertySet

WriteAMF0Header(string, bool, object)

AMF message packet #2a call. Write header(s).

void WriteAMF0Header(string Name, bool mustUnderstand, object Value)

Parameters

Name string
mustUnderstand bool
Value object

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF0HeaderCount(short)

AMF message packet #2 call. Write header count. Use zero to skip headers.

void WriteAMF0HeaderCount(short headerCount)

Parameters

headerCount short

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF0MessageCount(short)

AMF message packet #3 call. Write message count.

void WriteAMF0MessageCount(short messageCount)

Parameters

messageCount short

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF0MessageHeader(string, string, int)

AMF message packet #3a call. Write message(s). Set isAMF3content to true if you are sending AMF3 data in the message.

void WriteAMF0MessageHeader(string targetURI, string respURI, int length)

Parameters

targetURI string
respURI string
length int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF0MessageVersion(short)

AMF message packet #1 call. Write AMF0 message version.

void WriteAMF0MessageVersion(short sVersion)

Parameters

sVersion short
